name: Big Tower Tiny Square 2
author: Poki
description: Big Tower Tiny Square 2 is a puzzle platform game where you jump and pass dangerous obstacles and traps. Our square character is back for more adventure in the pursuit of finding the famous pineapple! Move up the carefully-designed tower while dodging spikes, traps, and other hazards. Touch every checkpoint in order to save your progress in this relentless multi-level platform. Can you reach the top and save Pineapple once again? Don't forget to share the game with your friends and find out who can complete the tower faster. How to play Big Tower Tiny Square 2? Move - A/D or Left/Right arrow keys Jump - Space or Up arrow Restart - Y Who created Big Tower Tiny Square 2? Big Tower Tiny Square 2 was created by EO Interactive. Play their other arcade games on Poki: Big Tower Tiny Square and Big NEON Tower VS Tiny Square How can I play Big Tower Tiny Square 2 for free? You can play Big Tower Tiny Square 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Big Tower Tiny Square 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Big Tower Tiny Square 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
